name: Pecan Pie II
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the honey and brown sugar together until combined.
2. Cook slowly to form a smooth syrup over low heat.
3. Add the melted butter to the syrup mixture.
4. Stir in the beaten eggs and chopped pecans until well combined.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
6. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 8 to 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean when tested.
